request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw a report that our allies are cutting back on joint defense exercises. If we don't step up our strategic autonomy now, who's going to have our back when it counts? Remember the 2024 cyber attacks? We can't afford to be caught off guard again. Time to invest in our own defenses and make sure we're prepared for any threat. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
